title: Issue 2073 root AGENTS fence repair

execplan_profile.projection_rule: canonical_core is authoritative for intent, scope, next action, proof, continuation, and closeout; legacy fields remain compatibility projections.

canonical_core.requested_outcome: Implement issue #2073: doctor should expose a safe scoped repair command for a missing or stale managed workflow fence in the configured root startup file, and the command should repair only that fence while preserving surrounding repo-owned content.
canonical_core.hard_constraints: Do not replace the whole root startup file. Keep missing configured startup files on the existing manual-review path. Keep this lane separate from #2074 local-only adoption, #2044 IR migration, and #1969 parent closeout.
canonical_core.agent_may_decide: Exact upgrade flag name, helper names, and test placement, provided doctor -> repair -> doctor is proven and generated command packages are refreshed.
canonical_core.escalate_when: A correct fix requires changing repo-owned startup semantics beyond the managed fence region or broad lifecycle mutation behavior.
canonical_core.next_action: Add a scoped root startup pointer repair flag to upgrade, surface it from doctor, update contracts/generated packages, and test doctor -> repair -> doctor with surrounding content preserved.
proof_expectations: uv run python scripts/run_agentic_workspace.py implement --target . --changed src/agentic_workspace/workspace_runtime_core.py src/agentic_workspace/workspace_runtime_primitives.py src/agentic_workspace/contracts/cli_commands.json src/agentic_workspace/contracts/operations/upgrade.lifecycle.json generated/workspace/python/adapter_commands.json generated/workspace/python/command_package.json generated/workspace/typescript/resources/command_package.json generated/workspace/typescript/resources/operations/upgrade.lifecycle.json generated/workspace/typescript/src/cli.mjs tests/test_workspace_doctor_status_cli.py .agentic-workspace/planning/execplans/issue-2073-root-agents-fence-repair.plan.json .agentic-workspace/planning/state.toml --task "Implement issue #2073 root AGENTS.md workflow fence repair command" --format json
completion_criteria: Doctor exposes a safe repair action for a stale or missing managed root workflow fence in the configured startup file.
The repair command updates only the managed fence region and preserves repo-owned content before and after it.
A follow-up doctor run no longer reports the root startup pointer warning after repair.
Generated command packages include the new upgrade flag.
Focused tests and generated-package checks pass.
canonical_core.continuation_owner: Follow-on stacked lanes remain #2074, #2044, and #1969 after this PR.

completion_criteria: Doctor exposes a safe repair action for stale or missing managed root workflow fences.
The scoped repair command preserves repo-owned content outside the managed fence.
Doctor -> repair -> doctor clears the root startup pointer warning in a focused test.
Generated command packages include the new upgrade flag and generated checks pass.

execution_run.what happened: Added upgrade --repair-root-startup-pointer, surfaced it as a safe doctor repair action, preserved missing root files as manual review, refreshed command-package outputs, and added doctor -> dry-run repair -> repair -> doctor regression coverage.
execution_run.scope touched: workspace runtime core/primitives, command contracts, generated workspace command packages, focused doctor tests, planning state
execution_run.changed surfaces: root startup pointer repair action and upgrade scoped repair mode; generated Python/TypeScript command metadata; tests/test_workspace_doctor_status_cli.py
execution_run.validations run: uv run pytest tests/test_workspace_doctor_status_cli.py -q; uv run python scripts/generate/generate_command_packages.py --check; AW implement changed-path proof selection; make test-workspace; make lint-workspace; contract tooling check; structured file inventory check; ruff contracts/checks; check_generated_command_packages; operation conformance; defaults root_cli_authority; AW summary; AW doctor --modules planning; tests/test_workspace_cli.py; make typecheck; runtime_mirror_consistency; make maintainer-surfaces
execution_run.result for continuation: Ready to commit, push, and open the #2073 stacked PR on top of #2086.
execution_run.next step: Publish the #2073 PR, then continue with #2074, #2044, and #1969 follow-on lanes.
